query:
INSERT INTO providers (name, type, tier, location, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, room_count, price_range, specialties, quality_score, response_time_avg, notes, status) VALUES
('Riad Yasmine', 'riad', 'platinum', 'Medina, Marrakech', 'Fatima El Amrani', '+212 524 123 456', 'fatima@riadyasmine.com', 7, '€200-€450/night', '["pool courtyard","rooftop terrace","traditional hammam","cooking classes"]', 4.8, 12, 'Premium partner since 2021. Excellent for couples and honeymooners. Instagram-famous pool courtyard.', 'active'),
('Royal Mansour Marrakech', 'hotel', 'platinum', 'Avenue Bab Jdid, Marrakech', 'Hassan Benali', '+212 529 808 080', 'concierge@royalmansour.com', 53, '€800-€5000/night', '["palace riads","michelin dining","royal spa","private butler"]', 4.9, 5, 'Ultra-luxury partner. 3 Michelin-star restaurants. Ideal for UHNW clients. Direct line to head concierge.', 'active'),
('La Mamounia', 'hotel', 'platinum', 'Avenue Bab Jdid, Marrakech', 'Karim Tazi', '+212 524 388 600', 'reservations@mamounia.com', 209, '€500-€3000/night', '["historic palace","gardens","spa","fine dining","pool"]', 4.7, 15, 'Iconic luxury hotel. Churchill suite for special occasions. Large group capacity.', 'active'),
('Riad Kniza', 'riad', 'gold', 'Derb l''Hotel, Medina, Marrakech', 'Mohammed Bouskri', '+212 524 376 942', 'info@riadkniza.com', 11, '€150-€350/night', '["antique decor","rooftop dining","traditional architecture","art collection"]', 4.5, 20, 'Boutique riad with exceptional antique collection. Great for culture-focused guests.', 'active'),
('Dar Anika', 'riad', 'gold', 'Riad Zitoun Lakdim, Marrakech', 'Anika Bergström', '+212 524 381 899', 'anika@daranika.com', 5, '€180-€400/night', '["swedish-moroccan fusion","wellness focus","yoga terrace","organic breakfast"]', 4.6, 18, 'Unique Swedish-Moroccan concept. Wellness-focused guests. Excellent organic cuisine.', 'active'),
('Kasbah Tamadot', 'hotel', 'platinum', 'Atlas Mountains, Asni', 'Richard Branson Team', '+212 524 368 200', 'reservations@kasbahtamadot.com', 28, '€400-€1500/night', '["mountain retreat","infinity pool","atlas views","berber culture","hiking"]', 4.8, 25, 'Virgin Limited Edition property. Perfect for adventure + luxury clients. Day trips from Marrakech.', 'active'),
('Riad 72', 'riad', 'silver', 'Arset Awsel, Medina, Marrakech', 'Lucrezia Marozzi', '+212 524 387 629', 'info@riad72.com', 4, '€120-€250/night', '["italian design","intimate","rooftop plunge pool","contemporary art"]', 4.3, 30, 'Small and intimate. Italian-designed interiors. Good for design-conscious couples on moderate budget.', 'active'),
('Selman Marrakech', 'hotel', 'gold', 'Route d''Amizmiz, Marrakech', 'Omar Fassi-Fihri', '+212 524 459 600', 'reservations@selman-marrakech.com', 60, '€350-€1200/night', '["arabian horses","olympic pool","modern luxury","spa","fine dining"]', 4.6, 10, 'Modern luxury with Arabian horse stud. Great pool scene. Good for families wanting space outside medina.', 'active');
